note: Pinned external sources for the haiku-tier inventory. Files live in data/haiku-tier/cache/ (gitignored); re-fetch by URL and verify sha256 before any rebuild. Fetched 2026-07-07.

core-wordnet.what: Princeton WordNet 'core' standoff list, 4,997 (pos, sense-key, lemma[, gloss hint]) lines - the standard ~5k most-frequent/salient sense list (Boyd-Graber et al.)

freq-en50k.what: hermitdave/FrequencyWords OpenSubtitles-2018 English top-50k surface frequency list, pinned at commit 072bbed (2019-02-13)

wn31-dict.what: WordNet 3.1 database files; used for lemma membership (index.*), proper-noun/instance heuristics + unit-of-measurement subtree (data.noun), morphology folds (*.exc), SemCor tag-mass ranking (cntlist.rev). Independent copy - data/lexical-wn31 is another agent's stream and is not touched.
